TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241560. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 8 side a of tape: Christian songs to Western tunes. The song titles are: 1) Joy to the World; 2) What a Friend We Have in Jesus; 3) Morning Prayer; 4) If Ever I Loved You; 3) I Listen to my Saviour. Recorded in March 1969.
